data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

Bloom Energy ( (BE) ) has provided an update.

Bloom Energy Corporation, a provider of on-site power generation solutions using solid oxide fuel cell technology, serves commercial and industrial customers seeking efficient and lower-emission energy options. The company focuses on delivering dependable power infrastructure that can complement or reduce reliance on traditional electric grids.

On April 27, 2026, Bloom Energy filed a prospectus supplement to its automatic shelf registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, covering an offering of its Class A common stock. The company concurrently filed a legal opinion from Latham & Watkins LLP attesting to the validity of the shares, a procedural step that supports its ability to access capital markets as needed.

The latest earnings call adds support via strong 2026 guidance and backlog growth, tempered by margin and execution volatility risks.

More about Bloom Energy

data.title: Bank of Marin Highlights Earnings Recovery and Dividend Declaration
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bank Of Marin Bancorp ( (BMRC) ) has shared an announcement.

Bank of Marin Bancorp reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $8.5 million, a sharp turnaround from a $39.5 million net loss in the fourth quarter of 2025 tied to balance sheet restructuring, and a 75% increase from $4.9 million a year earlier. Diluted earnings per share were $0.53, helped by continued net interest margin expansion, seasonal strength in new loan originations, higher deposits at flat cost, and improved credit quality marked by a substantial reduction in non-accrual and classified loans.

Management highlighted that securities repositioning completed in 2025 drove a 6-basis-point sequential increase in first-quarter 2026 tax-equivalent net interest margin to 3.24%, and a 47-basis-point improvement year over year through higher-yielding assets and lower average deposit costs. On April 23, 2026, the board approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share, payable May 14, 2026 to shareholders of record on May 7, underscoring confidence in the bank’s capital position and earnings recovery as it continues to emphasize core banking fundamentals and risk reduction.

Bancorp is also furnishing updated earnings presentation materials for use at investor conferences in the second quarter of 2026 and making them available on its website, alongside supplemental slide materials intended to be reviewed with the first-quarter results. These investor communications reflect the company’s effort to provide additional transparency on its margin trajectory, asset quality improvements, and the anticipated benefits from its balance sheet repositioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (BMRC) stock is a Hold with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bank Of Marin Bancorp stock, see the BMRC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BMRC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BMRC is a Neutral.

BMRC scores well overall due to a clear 2025 financial rebound backed by positive cash generation and constructive earnings-call guidance on margin/EPS improvement. The score is held back by recent earnings volatility (including a loss year and the large securities-loss impact) and a mixed technical picture despite supportive valuation and dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on BMRC stock, click here.

More about Bank Of Marin Bancorp

Bank of Marin Bancorp, parent of Bank of Marin, operates as a regional commercial bank focused on serving businesses and consumers in Northern California. It offers lending, deposit, and treasury management services, with a portfolio that includes commercial loans and securities, funded largely by core deposits in its local markets.

Average Trading Volume: 101,915

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $417.2M

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

BitMine Immersion Technologies ( (BMNR) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 27, 2026, Bitmine reported that its combined crypto, cash and “moonshot” investments reached $13.3 billion, anchored by 5.078 million ETH tokens—about 4.21% of Ethereum’s 120.7 million-coin supply—plus 200 BTC, $940 million in cash and significant stakes in Beast Industries and Eightco Holdings. The company said 3.7 million ETH, or roughly 73% of its ETH stack, is already staked generating an annualized $264 million in rewards, underscoring Bitmine’s emergence as the world’s largest Ethereum treasury, its recent uplisting to the New York Stock Exchange on April 9, 2026, and its growing profile as one of the most heavily traded U.S. stocks as it pursues a goal of accumulating 5% of all ETH.

Bitmine’s ETH position, which it amassed in just 10 months, positions it as a key beneficiary of Ethereum’s recent outperformance amid geopolitical tensions and of broader trends such as Wall Street asset tokenization and rising demand from AI systems for neutral public blockchains. Management highlighted that Bitmine now ranks as the top Ethereum treasury and the second-largest global crypto treasury behind Strategy Inc., while its MAVAN platform is expected to deepen institutional participation in ETH staking and further entrench the company’s role at the center of the Ethereum ecosystem.

The most recent analyst rating on (BMNR) stock is a Buy with a $33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BitMine Immersion Technologies stock, see the BMNR Stock Forecast page.

The company focuses on holding ETH as its primary reserve asset and monetizing those holdings through protocol-level activities such as staking and decentralized finance, supported by its MAVAN (Made-in America VAlidator Network) staking infrastructure launched in 2026.

data.title: BioMarin Completes Amicus Acquisition, Expands Rare Disease Portfolio
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

BioMarin Pharmaceutical ( (BMRN) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 27, 2026, BioMarin completed its previously announced all-cash acquisition of Amicus Therapeutics for $14.50 per share, valuing the target at about $4.8 billion and converting all eligible Amicus equity and equity-based awards into cash. The transaction, financed through a mix of new senior secured credit facilities totaling $3.4 billion, previously issued 5.500% senior notes due 2034 and cash on hand, also triggered the termination of BioMarin’s prior credit agreement and the extension of guarantees on its 2034 notes by additional subsidiaries.

The deal immediately adds three key assets to BioMarin’s rare disease franchise: Galafold, the first oral therapy for Fabry disease approved in more than 40 countries, the Pompe disease combination therapy Pombiliti plus Opfolda and U.S. rights to Phase 3 candidate DMX-200 for focal segmental glomerulosclerosis. By broadening its portfolio of lysosomal storage disease treatments and late-stage pipeline, while locking in substantial but covenant-heavy, asset-backed financing, BioMarin enhances its scale and diversification in the rare disease market, with implications for stronger revenue growth and expanded reach to specialized patient populations.

BioMarin Expects to Provide Updated FY 2026 Guidance During its First Quarter Earnings Call, May 4, 2026. The completion of the Amicus acquisition advances BioMarin’s strategy to strengthen and diversify its growth profile while furthering its mission to deliver medicines for people living with rare diseases.

The most recent analyst rating on (BMRN) stock is a Buy with a $120.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BioMarin Pharmaceutical stock, see the BMRN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BMRN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BMRN is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid fundamentals (growth, high gross margins, strong balance sheet, and healthy cash generation) and a largely positive outlook/guidance from the latest earnings call. Offsetting factors are weak technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD), a premium P/E without dividend support, and mixed event risk from the VOXZOGO trial halt and leverage tied to the Amicus acquisition.

To see Spark’s full report on BMRN stock, click here.

More about BioMarin Pharmaceutical

BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. is a global biotechnology company focused on rare, genetically defined diseases, with a portfolio of commercial therapies targeting lysosomal storage disorders and other inherited conditions, as well as a robust clinical and preclinical pipeline. Founded in 1997 and based in San Rafael, California, the company leverages in-house manufacturing and worldwide commercial infrastructure to develop and distribute category-defining medicines.

BioMarin’s strategy centers on using genetic science to address high unmet medical needs in small patient populations, positioning the company as a specialist in niche, high-value therapies. Its established presence in key markets such as the U.S., EU, U.K., and Japan supports its expansion into additional rare disease segments and enhances its ability to integrate acquired assets into its existing commercial and operational platform.

Average Trading Volume: 2,017,663

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $10.23B

data.title: Erasca Highlights ERAS-0015 Phase 1 Data Update
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Erasca ( (ERAS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 27, 2026, Erasca said it would host a conference call and webcast that day to discuss preliminary Phase 1 dose‑escalation data for its pan‑RAS molecular glue candidate ERAS‑0015 in patients with RAS‑mutant solid tumors, underscoring the program’s strategic importance in its oncology pipeline. The planned data discussion highlights ERAS‑0015 as a potentially best‑in‑class asset and signals a key early clinical milestone that could influence investor and partner perceptions of the company’s competitive standing in RAS‑targeted therapies.

Erasca also disclosed that on April 24, 2026, it received a letter from legal counsel for Revolution Medicines alleging that ERAS‑0015 infringes a Revolution Medicines patent, involves misappropriated trade secrets, and has been compared improperly to RMC‑6236 in public communications. Revolution Medicines demanded that Erasca halt most U.S. activities involving ERAS‑0015 and cease certain comparative statements, but Erasca said it believes the claims are without merit and intends to contest the allegations vigorously, introducing legal uncertainty around a core pipeline asset.

The most recent analyst rating on (ERAS) stock is a Buy with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Erasca stock, see the ERAS Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ERAS is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial fundamentals (no revenue, ongoing large losses, and material cash burn). Offsetting factors include a strong technical uptrend and positive corporate developments that extend cash runway and add a near-term clinical milestone, while valuation remains challenging due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on ERAS stock, click here.

More about Erasca

Erasca, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing targeted oncology therapies, including small‑molecule candidates aimed at cancers driven by RAS mutations and other key oncogenic pathways. The company’s pipeline is oriented toward potentially best‑in‑class precision medicines for patients with solid tumors, positioning it within the competitive targeted cancer therapeutics market.

data.title: Greenlane Regains Nasdaq Compliance and Secures Warrant Lockup
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greenlane Holdings ( (GNLN) ) has issued an update.

On April 21, 2026, Greenlane Holdings regained compliance with Nasdaq’s $1.00 minimum bid price requirement, prompting Nasdaq to cancel a previously scheduled May 5 delisting hearing and allowing the company’s Class A shares to remain on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The resolution removes an immediate listing overhang for investors and stabilizes Greenlane’s market standing after a period of share price weakness.

Also on April 21, 2026, the company disclosed that certain board-affiliated holders of Strategic Advisor Warrants agreed to lock up warrants covering 162,760 shares, along with the underlying stock, until April 23, 2027, reducing potential insider selling pressure. In connection with its October 2025 $110 million PIPE financing, major investor Berachain Investment Corporation began converting a portion of its 1,476,464 pre-funded warrants into common stock within contractual ownership limits, signaling continued confidence in Greenlane’s Berachain-focused strategy.

Spark’s Take on GNLN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GNLN is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by severe revenue contraction, persistent losses, and ongoing cash burn. Technicals add downside bias given weak longer-term moving-average positioning and negative MACD. Corporate events are mixed (buyback/strategy steps vs. Nasdaq delisting risk), and valuation support is limited because the company is loss-making and no dividend yield is provided.

To see Spark’s full report on GNLN stock, click here.

More about Greenlane Holdings

Greenlane Holdings, Inc., listed on Nasdaq under the ticker GNLN, is a publicly traded digital asset treasury company focused on accumulating BERA, the native token of the Berachain blockchain network. Holding about 77.9 million BERA, roughly 32% of its circulating supply, the company offers regulated, yield-generating exposure to Berachain through standard brokerage accounts without requiring crypto wallets or exchanges.

By positioning itself as the only Nasdaq-listed vehicle purpose-built for Berachain’s Proof of Liquidity infrastructure, Greenlane aims to serve investors seeking targeted exposure to this emerging ecosystem. Its model centers on acquiring, holding, and deploying BERA to participate in network incentives while providing traditional market access to digital asset returns.

Average Trading Volume: 202,596

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.53M

XOMA Royalty Corporation ( (XOMA) ) has provided an update.

On April 27, 2026, XOMA Royalty agreed to be acquired by fellow biotech royalty aggregator Ligand Pharmaceuticals for $39 per share in cash, valuing the target at about $739 million and reflecting a roughly 14% premium to XOMA Royalty’s 30-day average share price. Common shareholders are also expected to receive one non-transferable contingent value right per share tied to 75% of potential net proceeds from XOMA Royalty’s ongoing litigation with Janssen Biotech.

The transaction would fold more than 120 additional commercial, clinical and preclinical assets and seven marketed products into Ligand’s portfolio, immediately boost Ligand’s earnings per share, and strengthen its positioning as a leading biopharma royalty aggregator by broadening its exposure to ophthalmology, oncology, CNS and rare diseases.

data.title: Strategy Boosts Bitcoin Holdings Using ATM Stock Sales
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Strategy ( (MSTR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 27, 2026, Strategy Inc. reported that between April 20 and April 26 it sold 1,451,601 shares of its MSTR Class A common stock under its at-the-market program, generating net proceeds of $255 million, while leaving substantial remaining issuance capacity across its common and preferred stock lines. No sales occurred in its listed preferred securities during the period, and the company continues to rely on its website dashboard as a key disclosure channel for securities data and other metrics.

During the same April 20–26 period, Strategy used the $255 million in ATM proceeds to acquire 3,273 bitcoin at an average price of $77,906 per coin, bringing its total holdings as of April 26, 2026, to 818,334 bitcoin purchased for an aggregate $61.81 billion at an average cost of $75,537. The update underscores Strategy’s ongoing use of equity issuance to fund aggressive bitcoin accumulation, reinforcing its positioning as a leveraged proxy for bitcoin exposure and affecting risk and return dynamics for shareholders and other market participants.

The most recent analyst rating on (MSTR) stock is a Buy with a $212.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Strategy stock, see the MSTR Stock Forecast page.

The latest update is out from DMC Global ( (BOOM) ).

On April 24, 2026, DMC Global Inc. amended its Stockholder Protection Rights Agreement with Computershare Trust Company, extending the expiration of existing shareholder rights by one year from June 4, 2026, to June 4, 2027, while leaving all other terms unchanged. The amended agreement continues to limit most investors from acquiring 10% or more of DMC Global’s common stock, or 20% for passive investors, reinforcing protections against large, potentially hostile accumulations of shares and preserving the company’s ability to manage control changes and shareholder influence.

Under the agreement, “Beneficial Ownership” still covers securities that can be acquired in the future through conversion or similar rights, whether or not they are immediately exercisable. By maintaining these provisions and extending the rights’ duration, DMC Global signals an ongoing commitment to defending its capital structure, which may affect activist investors, strategic acquirers, and other stakeholders considering building significant positions in the stock.

data.title: Business First Bancshares Grows via Progressive Acquisition, Strong Q1
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Business First Bancshares ( (BFST) ) has shared an announcement.

In the first quarter of 2026, Business First reported net income available to common shareholders of $22.2 million, or $0.68 per diluted share, and core net income of $24.0 million, or $0.73 per diluted share, while completing its acquisition of Progressive Bancorp, Inc., adding nine branches, boosting loans, deposits and securities, and modestly lifting book value per share. During the period and shortly afterward, the bank declared preferred and common dividends, repurchased shares, issued $85 million of subordinated notes while redeeming prior debt, expanded its Houston leadership and production teams, launched an agentic AI partnership with Covecta to automate operational workflows, and managed mixed but stable credit metrics, underscoring a strategy of balance-sheet growth, capital optimization and operational modernization.

Net loans held for investment rose nearly 8% quarter over quarter, driven largely by the Progressive acquisition, while organic loans declined modestly and deposits grew 11.44% overall, including solid organic gains in both interest-bearing and noninterest-bearing accounts. Credit quality showed slightly higher nonperforming loan and asset ratios tied to previously identified relationships expected to be resolved later in 2026, but past-due levels fell and net charge-offs dropped sharply, as net interest income improved to $75.2 million despite a small narrowing in net interest margin and spread alongside a lower overall cost of funds.

data.title: CorMedix Reports Positive Phase III REZZAYO Prophylaxis Results
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cormedix ( (CRMD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 27, 2026, CorMedix announced positive topline data from the global Phase III ReSPECT trial of REZZAYO (rezafungin) in adult patients undergoing allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation, a group at high risk of invasive fungal diseases. The once‑weekly rezafungin regimen achieved non‑inferior Day 90 fungal‑free survival versus a standard antimicrobial regimen, with 60.7% fungal‑free survival compared with 59.0% on standard therapy.

The study showed comparable efficacy and mortality between treatment arms against Candida, Aspergillus and Pneumocystis, but highlighted a favorable safety and tolerability profile for rezafungin, including fewer toxicity‑related discontinuations and fewer treatment‑emergent adverse events leading to dose modification or study withdrawal. Sponsored by Mundipharma, which holds ex‑U.S. rights, the trial outcome strengthens REZZAYO’s positioning as a potential prophylactic option in immunocompromised transplant patients and supports CorMedix’s efforts to broaden the drug’s label in a large U.S. hospital market for invasive fungal prophylaxis.

The most recent analyst rating on (CRMD) stock is a Buy with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cormedix stock, see the CRMD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CRMD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CRMD is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by sharply improved 2025 financial performance and cash generation, tempered by sustainability concerns. Technicals materially detract due to a clear downtrend and weak momentum signals. Valuation is supportive via a low P/E, while earnings-call guidance and catalysts are balanced by significant reimbursement-driven pricing and concentration risks.

To see Spark’s full report on CRMD stock, click here.

More about Cormedix

CorMedix Therapeutics, listed on Nasdaq as CRMD, is a U.S. biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing treatments for life‑threatening conditions. The company markets its products primarily to hospitals, clinics and infusion centers, and currently sells rezafungin (REZZAYO) for the treatment of candidemia and invasive candidiasis in adults.

CorMedix operates with a field‑based medical and commercial infrastructure deployed across institutional care settings in the U.S. Its strategy centers on high‑risk, immunocompromised patient populations where invasive fungal infections remain a significant unmet medical need, and where differentiated dosing and safety profiles can support adoption of new antifungal therapies.

data.title: RedHill Biopharma Reshapes Talicia Franchise and Strengthens Balance Sheet in 2025 Results
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

RedHill Biopharma ( (RDHL) ) has shared an announcement.

RedHill Biopharma on April 27, 2026 reported its full-year 2025 results, highlighting a transformative year marked by the creation of Talicia Holdings Inc. and a U.S. co-commercialization deal with Cumberland Pharmaceuticals, which took a 30% stake in the new vehicle for $4 million. The company broadened Talicia’s reach through added Humana Part D coverage, new Middle East licensing that generated about $1.9 million in discontinued-operations revenue, and preparations for a fast-track marketing application in the U.K.

RedHill also sharpened its R&D focus, advancing RHB-204 for Crohn’s disease under positive FDA feedback, progressing opaganib in a Phase 2 prostate cancer combination trial and other oncology indications, and positioning RHB-102 (Bekinda) as a potential therapy for GLP-1/GIP-related gastrointestinal side effects. Corporate moves included licensing RHB-102 to Hyloris outside North America for up to $60 million in milestones plus royalties, securing a $10 million equity line with Alumni Capital, and winning more than $10.5 million in New York court rulings against Kukbo, contributing to a swing from a $4.7 million capital deficiency in 2024 to $4.3 million positive equity and $4.1 million cash at year-end 2025.

Management framed 2025 as a year of “tenacity” in a challenging sector, citing the restructured Talicia business, strategic partnerships and licensing, and a leaner cost base as drivers of improved financial footing. These initiatives position RedHill for future growth by leveraging co-commercialization platforms, ex-U.S. licensing, and a focused pipeline in large markets such as GLP-1 therapies, while continued realization of legal awards and access to additional capital remain important for liquidity and execution.

More about RedHill Biopharma

RedHill Biopharma Ltd. is a specialty biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Tel Aviv and Raleigh, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker RDHL. The company focuses on gastrointestinal and inflammatory diseases and oncology, with key assets including Talicia for H. pylori infection, opaganib as an add-on oncology therapy, and RHB-102 (Bekinda) for gastrointestinal indications, including GLP-1/GIP-related side effects.

RedHill targets both U.S. and international markets through direct commercialization, partnerships, and licensing deals. Its strategy combines co-commercialization ventures, such as the Talicia Holdings Inc. structure in the U.S., and regional licensing agreements in territories like the Middle East and ex-North America, while maintaining a leaner operational footprint and a focused late-stage R&D pipeline.

data.title: Real Brokerage to Acquire RE/MAX, Form Real REMAX Group
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Re/Max Holdings ( (RMAX) ) has shared an update.

On April 27, 2026, The Real Brokerage Inc. and RE/MAX Holdings announced a definitive agreement under which Real will acquire RE/MAX for an implied enterprise value of about $880 million, creating a combined technology-enabled global real estate platform to be named Real REMAX Group. In light of the pending deal, RE/MAX canceled its first-quarter 2026 earnings call scheduled for May 8, 2026, underscoring how the transaction will reshape its financial communications and corporate structure.

The combination unites Real’s AI-powered brokerage platform and owned-brokerage model with RE/MAX’s established global franchise network, together serving more than 180,000 agents and nearly 8,500 franchisees worldwide. On a 2025 pro forma basis, the merged group would have generated about $2.3 billion in revenue and $157 million in adjusted EBITDA, and is projected to be earnings- and margin-accretive, supported by roughly $30 million in anticipated annual cost synergies and a plan for rapid deleveraging.

Following closing, Real CEO Tamir Poleg will become chairman and CEO of Real REMAX Group, which will be headquartered in Miami with substantial operations retained in Denver and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker REAX. Under the agreed terms, RE/MAX shareholders can elect cash or stock in the new holding company within set cash limits, leaving existing Real investors with an expected 59% stake and RE/MAX investors with about 41% of the combined business, subject to customary approvals and closing conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (RMAX) stock is a Hold with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Re/Max Holdings stock, see the RMAX Stock Forecast page.

RE/MAX Holdings, Inc., parent of the RE/MAX, LLC franchise network, operates in the global residential and commercial real estate services industry, focusing on franchised brokerage services under the RE/MAX and Motto Mortgage brands. The company’s model emphasizes a capital-light, higher-margin franchise system with more than 145,000 agents across over 120 countries and territories.
